title: Test 04 - Part B - Extract 3
subtitle: Preparing for Student Intake
transcript:
In September we'll have a lot of new patients as the first year university students will all register during freshers.
Yes, we were really run off our feet last year, weren't we?
Yep, it was a madhouse.
Do you think we should hire agency staff to help out for the first couple of weeks this time around?
Well, I think part of the problem was that last year Dr Igwe and Nurse Fletcher were both away.
Dr Igwe went to Costa Rica and Nurse Fletcher had the flu.
Right, I remember, well...
We can't do much to prevent staff illness.
No, but we can ask people to avoid booking time off in those first three weeks.
Okay, I'll send an email out today.

challenges.content: In September we'll have a lot of new patients as the first year university students will all register during freshers.
Yes, we were really run off our feet last year, weren't we?
Do you think we should hire agency staff to help out for the first couple of weeks this time around?
Well, I think part of the problem was that last year Dr Igwe and Nurse Fletcher were both away.
Dr Igwe went to Costa Rica and Nurse Fletcher had the flu.
We can't do much to prevent staff illness.
No, but we can ask people to avoid booking time off in those first three weeks.
Okay, I'll send an email out today.
